questions.text: Differentiate between connection-oriented and connection-less services.
Define bandwidth-delay product with example.
Differentiate between 1-persistent and p-persistent CSMA.
Assuming even parity, find the parity bit for each of the following data: i. 1011010 ii. 000000 iii. 10010001
Distinguish between routing and forwarding.
Describe any two techniques for achieving good Quality of Service.
Write notes on internet multicasting.
List the IP address ranges and subnet masks of class A, class B and class C.
List the transport service primitives.
How recursive query resolution is performed in DNS?
Write the functions of data link and network layer of OSI reference model.
Explain the various physical topologies with neat sketches.
How computer networks are categorized based on scale? Explain the features of each network.
Differentiate between Manchester encoding and Differential Manchester encoding with suitable example.
Explain the various framing methods used in data link layer.
Which are the different types of errors? Explain with examples.
Draw and explain the frame format of IEEE 802.11.
A bit stream 10011101 is transmitted using the CRC method. The generator polynomial is x3 + 1. Show the actual bit string transmitted.
Explain distance vector routing algorithm with an example.
Explain any three closed loop congestion control techniques.
Explain how routing is performed using link state algorithm. Illustrate with an example.
Write notes on load shedding.
Illustrate subnetting with an example.
Draw the IPv6 header. Explain the significance of each field.
Describe the features of BGP. How does BGP avoid count to infinity problem?
Draw and explain BOOTP message format.
How does FTP handle file transfer operation?
What is the significance of SNMP? Describe its components.
Three-way handshake procedure is used to establish a connection in TCP rather than two-way handshake. Justify.
Describe the working of electronic mail system.
